source_issue.title: Deployment documentation needs to show Seamless mode first, rather then classic "simple"

summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue addresses the need to reorganize the deployment documentation for Volto on Plone. Currently, the "Simple deployment" section appears before "Seamless mode," which should be prioritized. There are ongoing discussions about how to present this information clearly.

## What needs to be done
1. Change the order of deployment sections, placing "Seamless mode" first in the navigation.
2. Update the "Simple deployment" section to indicate that it's only for older versions of Plone and include a deprecation warning.
3. Refactor the content to ensure it guides users appropriately, mentioning that "Simple deployment" is still valid but secondary.

## Helpful background
"Seamless mode" refers to installing Volto on older Plone versions without needing `plone.restapi` 2.0, while "Simple deployment" is becoming outdated. Clarity is needed in the documentation to guide new users effectively.

## Good first steps
1. Review the deployment documentation linked [here](https://6.docs.plone.org/volto/deploying/index.html).
2. Discuss proposed changes with the issue author, [tiberiuichim](https://github.com/tiberiuichim), and contributor [stevepiercy](https://github.com/stevepiercy).
3. Be prepared to write and test any documentation updates and discuss them in the comments for feedback.
